name: Pour Concrete
description: Pouring a concrete slab, sidewalk, patio, or driveway
tips: Pour in early morning to allow a full day of curing
Keep concrete above 50°F for 48 hours after pouring
Use curing blankets if overnight temps drop near freezing
seoContent: Concrete cures best between 50°F and 90°F. Hydration slows significantly below 50°F and is nearly non-existent below 40°F. Rain within the first 4–8 hours can damage the surface, and freezing before initial cure can reduce strength by up to 50%.
